case_title: GOLDMAN, PETER Z. et al vs. BUBENYAK, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN, PETER Z. STOLYAROVA, MARIYA AS TO DEFENDANT BUBENYAK, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-20-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-30-1996
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-24-1997, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED 3-13-97.

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-10-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), STATUS CONFERENCE AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES, FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE STATUS CONFERENCE ON 11/19/96 AND STATUS CONFERENCE ON 12/19/96. EXPLANATION WHY ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND WHY FURTHER MONETARY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED. HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL. HEARING SET FOR FEB-10-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
